Hi Kaustubh, just adding the exact blocker from my side.

I can raise the IIQ request, but I could not find the WNZLTEST remote login / RDP entitlement as requestable from my side.

Yesterday I searched for CORPTESTNZ, Remote Desktop, Citrix Remote, and related keywords. The only Remote Desktop entitlement I could find was under Active Directory - WNZL, not Active Directory - WNZLTEST.

From the sample account Aldous shared, the missing inherited groups seem to be around:
- CORPTESTNZ-Resource-Remote Desktop
- CORPTESTNZ-Resource-Citrix-Remote Access Users

But I cannot confirm/request those directly from my side in IIQ.

Could you please confirm the exact entitlement name I should request, or whether this needs to be added by fixIT/AD support instead of a normal IIQ request?
